description: A student was charged a late fee on their tuition bill but claims they paid on time.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and the late fee in question.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the charge on the student's account.

nodes.task_description: Review the student's payment history, including the timestamp of the last payment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the payment was posted one day after the due date.

nodes.task_description: Check the student's record for any prior late payments. Finding none, offer a one-time courtesy waiver of the fee.

expected_outcome.expected: As a goodwill gesture for a first-time issue, the agent waives the fee.
